title: Dreamlands
body:
# Dreamlands
_Escape reality in your dreamland._

Dreamlands is a horror survival adventure mod, adding 2 dimensions to traverse during sleep. Explore a dream in the Dreamland, a naturey, fairycore, cottagecore, candycore esque land adding biomes such as a Wisteria Grove to a Flower Field. Or experience a nightmare in the (eventual) Nightmoor.

As of now the mod includes 7 biomes in the dreamland dimension, accessed from sleeping in a bed while having the sleepy effect.


## IMPORTANT NOTICE
This mod is still in active development and *is NOT a finished product*.
Bugs will occur, and changes are very constant. These changes can potentially cause problems in worlds over time. (i.e. a block being removed or renamed)

Please report issues over on [github](https://github.com/jayhillx/Dreamlands/issues).

Est. 11.2020
